Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Feb-04-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Jessica Alvarez.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Lee M. Mendelson, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Citizens Bank, N.A.
Mario Sousa, Collections Operations Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Mendelson & Sousa appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Jessica Alavarez.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Open Book Account, Account Stated and Unjust Enrichment was filed on August 10, 2018, and personally served on defendant Jessica Alaverz on August 23, 2018.
Default as to defendant Jessica Alvarez was entered on October 18, 2018.
DOE defendants November 10, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Citizens Bank, N.A., and against the defaulted defendant Jessica Alvarez, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $23,303.27.
Prejudgment Interest - $353.72.
Costs - $934.90.

Total - $24,591.89.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
